EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IContourFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control contour function arguments.

[Guid("8662CBB7-5777-42FF-A764-26DDD8F1B87A")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IContourFunctionArguments

Properties

ContourInterval

The contour interval. Only used if number of contours <= 0.

double ContourInterval { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ContourType

The contour type. Lines, fill, or smooth elevation only.

esriContourType ContourType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriContourType

Examples

Sample Snippet

DEM

The input elevation.

object DEM { get; set; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

NthContourLineInBold

Draw nth contour line in bold.

int NthContourLineInBold { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

NumberOfContours

The number of contours to aim for in the current tile. Contour interval gets adjusted per tile.

int NumberOfContours { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

SigmaGaussian

The sigma controls the size of the Gaussian used for smoothing the elevation raster.

double SigmaGaussian { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ZBase

The base elevation for the contour lines.

double ZBase { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ZFactor

The Z scale factor that converts z value to the unit of x and y.

double ZFactor { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet
